penalties.description: One ring was dropped and left the field of view, becoming unretrievable.

reasoning: The timing start was visible, and the majority of the transfers were conducted within view. However, a loss of one object was confirmed. The final release could not be confirmed due to partial framing and some blurriness, leading to decreased confidence.
